description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical stone obelisk with a fluted surface and a prominent, angular white cap at the top. The front features a dramatic black eagle sculpture with outstretched wings, perched on a stepped pedestal integrated into the base. The obelisk stands on a square, tiered platform with a slightly rough texture, and a star relief is visible above the eagle on the shaft. The stone appears weathered, giving it a sense of age and permanence, while the eagle adds a bold, commemorative element. The overall design is monumental, suggesting a memorial or landmark function in an urban setting. No visible inscriptions are present, but the ornamentation and form are highly distinctive.
description: A tall, fluted stone obelisk with a white angular cap and a black eagle sculpture on a stepped base, set on a square platform.
description_view_0: The front view shows the black eagle sculpture with wings spread, the fluted shaft, and the angular white cap, all set on a stepped base.
description_view_1: The rear view reveals the plain cylindrical stone shaft and the square platform, with no visible ornamentation or eagle.
description_view_2: The side view highlights the fluted shaft, the angular white cap, and a partial view of the eagle and stepped base.
description_view_3: The oblique front view displays the eagle sculpture, the star relief above it, the fluted shaft, and the stepped base in detail.
attribute_ornamentation: A large black eagle sculpture with outstretched wings is attached to the front, and a star relief is carved above the eagle on the shaft.
attribute_base_design: The base is a square, tiered platform with a stepped design, constructed from the same stone material as the shaft, providing stability and a monumental appearance.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is angular and white, resembling a faceted cap, distinct from the rest of the shaft and visually prominent.
